controls.name: Establish network segmentation boundaries
Secure cloud services with network controls
controls.note: All PaaS services behind private endpoints

controls.name: Deploy firewall at the edge of enterprise network
Filter network traffic
Deploy DDOS protection
Deploy web application firewall
Simplify network security configuration
Detect and disable insecure services and protocols
Use centralized identity and authentication system
Protect identity and authentication system
Manage application identities securely
Authenticate server and services
Use single sign-on for application access
Use strong authentication controls
Restrict resource access based on conditions
Discover classify and label sensitive data
Monitor anomalies and threats targeting sensitive data
Encrypt sensitive data in transit
Enable data at rest encryption by default
Use customer-managed key option in data at rest encryption
controls.note: CMK on all storage and SQL

controls.name: Use a secure key management process
Separate and limit highly privileged users
Avoid standing access for user accounts and permissions
Manage lifecycle of identities and entitlements
Review and reconcile user access regularly
Set up emergency access
Use privileged access workstations
Follow just enough administration principle
controls.reason: Infrastructure and Security teams share Contributor role — insufficient separation of duties for FCA SYSC 13

ncscCafGaps.finding: Security log retention set to 365 days — NCSC recommends 12 months minimum but FCA expects 7 years for audit trails
No cross-region DR configured — single UK South region
Sentinel SOAR playbooks not configured — manual triage only
